title: King and Queen Fall Back
description: On pages 0–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, King as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: T/N: KANji means "drunk Dragon BAGUA". Chinese read is "Famed for Booze".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fire festival is also coming to 'a'close...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know, you idiot!! This is the only day of the year I can drink at all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's back to our country's bitter reality!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You never know if one of his agents is around...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seems the festival is starting to wind down.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're getting the sky lanterns ready.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Time to write your wishes for our ancestors to see!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Will they really make them come true?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The capital is celebrating the fire festival today...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And we were supposed to host a grand banquet here on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on original!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Although you've pretty much ruined that!! Fufufu..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: AND I'VE ALREADY ACKNOWLEDGED YOUR STRENETH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I can't remember the last time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was challenged to a serious one-on-one fight!! Whereeew!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
